violations.description: Serial mode in E2E suite blocks parallel execution and increases CI wall-clock time.
violations.suggestion: Convert suite to parallel-safe isolation and remove serial mode where possible.

violations.description: Serial API suite reduces throughput despite mostly independent request-level scenarios.
violations.suggestion: Drop serial mode and rely on deterministic fixture setup per test case.

violations.description: Large integration suite repeatedly boots app/context and can become a runtime hotspot.
violations.suggestion: Extract shared app/bootstrap helpers and split suite for better shard distribution.

violations.description: Repeated full-login setup per E2E case increases runtime compared with cached storage-state patterns.
violations.suggestion: Adopt storage-state/session reuse where this does not reduce scenario independence.

performance_metrics.avg_test_duration_estimate: ~2-4 seconds per API case, higher for E2E viewport loops

recommendations: Remove serial mode where scenario independence allows.
Shard/split very large route integration suite for faster CI feedback.
Use storage-state auth optimization in E2E flow-heavy suites.
summary: Performance has 4 violations, primarily from serial execution and heavy suite structure.
